description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of two jobs: one to check clang-format in an Arch Linux container and another to build and test the project in parallel with different compilers (GCC and Clang) in separate Arch Linux containers. The build job depends on the clang-format job and includes steps to install dependencies, cache fcitx5 data files, build and install fcitx5 and fcitx5-rime, and perform CodeQL analysis.
